hero_max_lines.message: Hero H1 must not exceed 2-3 lines. Use wider containers (max-w-5xl or wider) and smaller font sizes.

bento_grid_density.message: Bento grids must use grid-flow-dense with mathematically verified col-span/row-span values to prevent empty cells.

section_spacing.message: Major sections must have minimum py-32 md:py-48 spacing between them.

gsap_motion.message: Interactive elements must have GSAP hover physics (group-hover:scale-105) and scroll animations (ScrollTrigger).

meta_label_ban.message: Cheap meta-labels like 'SECTION 01' or 'QUESTION 05' are banned. Use descriptive text instead.

button_contrast.message: Button text must be perfectly legible. Dark background requires white text, light background requires dark text.

typography.message: Must use approved fonts (Satoshi, Cabinet Grotesk, Outfit, Geist). Inter is strictly banned.

horizontal_scroll_prevention.message: Page must be wrapped in overflow-x-hidden w-full max-w-full to prevent horizontal scrollbars.

aida_structure.message: Page must follow AIDA structure: Navigation -> Hero -> Content Sections -> Footer.
